title: Tender award explanation
summary: 3 promoted claims answer the request. Every statement below is bound to reviewed evidence by the claim contract.

sections.heading: Evaluation results
sections.body: Comercial Hagelin obtained the highest evaluated percentage, 98.33%, followed by Metalurgica Silcosil at 88.50%; all six remaining suppliers scored below 73%.

sections.heading: Award recommendation
sections.body: The evaluation commission proposed awarding the office furniture purchase to Comercial Hagelin SpA; this snapshot does not establish that a final contract was signed.

sections.heading: Reason for recommendation
sections.body: The other seven suppliers were not recommended because their final evaluated percentages were lower than Comercial Hagelin's 98.33% under the published 90% price and 10% delivery-time weighting.

recommendation: Use the cited evidence and unresolved review items before taking a consequential procurement decision.
